name: axis_pipeline_fifo
description: AXI-stream pipeline FIFO/register slice for timing closure with a small number of ready/valid stages.

source_refs.notes: AXI-stream pipeline FIFO for timing closure; this skill keeps a compact two-stage teaching subset.

parameters.name: PIPELINE
parameters.description: Number of register stages in the timing pipeline.

states.name: EMPTY_PIPE
states.description: No valid words are resident in the pipeline stages.

states.name: FLOWING
states.description: Words advance through the registered ready/valid stages.

states.name: STALLED
states.description: Downstream backpressure holds valid stages stable.

constraints: Use for timing closure or register slicing on AXI-stream paths.
Do not use for large burst buffering; choose axis_fifo.
Do not use for SRL-specific small storage; choose axis_srl_fifo.
Each valid stage must hold its data while the next stage cannot accept it.
patterns: Build a chain of ready/valid storage stages.
A stage can accept when it is empty or the next stage accepts.
Backpressure ripples upstream through stage-ready signals.
Data advances one stage per clock when downstream is ready.
implementation_notes: Favor this skill when the query mentions timing closure, pipeline FIFO, register slice, or added latency.
Keep the pipeline shallow and deterministic; use axis_fifo for queue depth.
The teaching template fixes two stages because parameterized generate logic is not the point of the skill.
Duplicate sideband registers for tlast, tkeep, or tuser when those fields are requested.
test_strategy: Send two words through a stalled output and verify order.
Exercise backpressure to verify input ready deassertion.
Drain after stall and confirm all stage data is preserved.
verification_goals: Pipeline stages preserve accepted stream order.
Downstream stalls hold output data stable.
Backpressure reaches the input when all stages are occupied.
No word is duplicated or skipped when the pipeline resumes.
